name: public-space-extraction-export
description: Contract for exporting normalized public space data to CSV files

input.source: transformed database with normalized public space tables

modified_files.name: addresses.csv
changes: Replace PublicSpaceName text column with PublicSpaceName_ID foreign key
Replace PublicSpaceType text column with PublicSpaceType_ID foreign key
Apply house number formatting (remove leading zeros)

export_steps.query: SELECT ID, PublicSpaceName FROM PublicSpaceName ORDER BY PublicSpaceName ASC
SELECT ID, PublicSpaceType FROM PublicSpaceType ORDER BY PublicSpaceType ASC

export_steps.description: Export SettlementPublicSpaces lookup table to CSV
export_steps.query: SELECT Settlement_ID, PublicSpaceName_ID, PublicSpaceType_ID FROM SettlementPublicSpaces ORDER BY Settlement_ID ASC, PublicSpaceName_ID ASC

export_steps.description: Export updated Address table with foreign keys
export_steps.query: SELECT ID, Settlement_ID, PublicSpaceName_ID, PublicSpaceType_ID, HouseNumber, Building, Staircase, Floor, Door, PostalCode_ID, PollingStation_ID FROM Address ORDER BY Settlement_ID ASC, PublicSpaceName_ID ASC, HouseNumber ASC

data_quality_requirements.referential_integrity: All foreign keys in exported data must reference existing entities
data_quality_requirements.consistency: All CSV files must use UTF-8 encoding
data_quality_requirements.formatting: House numbers must be formatted (leading zeros removed)

integration_requirements.compatibility: Must work with existing release workflow
integration_requirements.backward_compatibility: Address CSV must maintain same structure except for public space columns
integration_requirements.validation: Must pass existing data validation checks
